function.message: Before we talk product, tell me whether you actually slept and went outside.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS before entering folders, resolved canonical entity via cast record, and checked all channel logs exhaustively before selecting latest message.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical target resolved as Sara Demir via 10_entities/cast/sara.md. Across all channel logs, only 60_outbox/channels/health_signal.md contains a Sara Demir-authored message, making it the latest recorded message from that entity.
